name: node-socks
title: node-socks
description:
Fully featured SOCKS proxy client
Fully featured SOCKS proxy client supporting SOCKSv4, SOCKSv4a,
and SOCKSv5. Includes Bind and Associate functionality.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-socks because Fully featured SOCKS proxy client.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-socks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-socks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-socks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
